jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Aptech
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
